platforms.label: YouTube Shorts
platforms.setCommand: python3 tools/promotion_profile_writeback.py update --platform youtube_shorts --status set --set-date 2026-06-30 --proof-note "<REAL_SCREENSHOT_OR_PROFILE_CLICK_NOTE> verified"
platforms.liveCommand: python3 tools/promotion_profile_writeback.py update --platform youtube_shorts --status live --set-date 2026-06-30 --proof-note "<REAL_PROFILE_CLICK_NOTE> verified"

afterWriteback: Only publish first batch when readiness ready_to_publish=1
